response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad full-stack experience, open-source contributions (GISCollective), and Linux familiarity, but the role requires C1 German and explicit team leadership experience, both of which are missing. Resume shows founder/staff-level work rather than formal Head of Development or people management responsibility, and Python is not listed among skills.
strengths: Extensive software engineering across web, mobile, embedded with Linux exposure
Open-source leadership via GISCollective platform and conference talks
Architecture, testing, and DevOps breadth across multiple stacks
concerns: German only at Basic level — far below required C1
No explicit Head of Dev or formal team-management track record
Python not listed in skills; UML/requirements management not evidenced
